ideation: This animation sequence portrays a family – two adults and two children – in a warm and embracing gesture.  The adults will use a slightly protective pose while the children are more playful and energetic. I will ensure that the movements are smooth and expressive, leveraging the robot's two-joint arm system to create natural-looking motions.  I will avoid jerky or mechanical movements by focusing on significant changes between each keyframe, leaving the interpolation to the animation system. The family is represented by the emoji 🧑‍🧑‍🧒‍🧒.

frames.beat: arms open wide, a welcoming gesture
